calendar.matters:
Petition For Court To Retain Trust Proceeding In Current Venue Or In The Alternative, To Transfer Case To Appropriate Court (Change Of Venue) Memo Of Pas In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Dec-15-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharon Adams (via court call) for (petitioner) Dessie Chambers. Timothy Walker (via court call) for (respondent) Wynda Atkins.

The Court stated that there are two petitions, that the objections raise the issue of venue and that the court does not see that there is venue here. Ms. Adams stated that there is a pending partition action in San Francisco with the same parties and witnesses and that it would be convenient to have it all in San Francisco. The Court stated that the partition actions is not a reason for venue on this matter and that they would not be heard together. Ms. Adams cited 396(b)(d) regarding the basis to retain venue, that it can be done for convenience and in the interest of justice and that it would alleviate the costs of trying 2 cases in 2 counties. The court stated that it is not persuaded and gave the choice of a transfer or to withdraw the petition and refile in the proper county. Ms. Adams stated that she does not want to refile as she does not have the cooperation of opposing counsel. Mr. Walker stated that they will cooperate with either a transfer or a refiling. The Court stated that the matter will be transferred to Alameda County, contingent on receipt of the proper transfer fees, that Mr. Walker is to prepare an order. The Court granted the petition for court to retain trust proceeding in current venue or in the alternative to transfer case to appropriate court, etc. (subject to review of the order). The petition of D.L. Chambers to remove successor trsutee Wynda Atkins, to appoint successor trustee and for accounting is to be decided in Alameda County.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
